parameters.name: quality
parameters.label: Quality
parameters.description: Controls the quality of the anti-alias process. A higher quality will require more power to compute.

parameters.name: edgedetectsource
parameters.label: Edge Detect Source
parameters.description: This controls how edges are detected in the image. Anti-aliasing is only done along detected edges.

parameters.name: edgethreshold
parameters.label: Edge Threshold
parameters.description: Controls the sensitivity of edge detection. Use the "Output Edges" mode to see it in action.

parameters.name: maxsearchsteps
parameters.label: Max Search Steps
parameters.description: How many horizontal and vertical search steps are done when looking for edges.

parameters.name: maxdiagsearchsteps
parameters.label: Max Diag Search Steps
parameters.description: How many diagonal search steps are done when looking for edges.

parameters.name: cornerrounding
parameters.label: Corner Rounding
parameters.description: Control strength of rounding edge corners.

parameters.name: outputedges
parameters.label: Output Edges
parameters.description: For visualizing what parts of the image will be anti-aliased. This shows the edges that are being detected, so you can tell where the anti-aliasing is being applied.
